_title: Retrospective NR-V04 three-paralogue ternary benchmark (Track B) — spec
_goal: The higher-value method contribution (gate-AI, 2026-07-11): can a BLINDED, ENSEMBLE-based ternary workflow recover the EXPERIMENTALLY KNOWN NR4A1-selective degradation geometry of NR-V04 and distinguish it from the NOT-degraded NR4A2/NR4A3 assemblies? NR-V04 is the FAMILY-MATCHED POSITIVE CONTROL the de-novo NR4A3 system lacks. Only if the workflow passes THIS control do we trust it to rank a prospective NR4A3 degrader.
_status: SPEC (2026-07-11). Structure validated; harness build + single-leg-first pilot = next.

ground_truth.source: Wang et al. J Exp Med 2024;221(3):e20231519 (PMID 38334978); MedChemExpress NR-V04
ground_truth.mechanism_evidence: selective degradation + PLA/co-IP NR4A1-VHL complex + VHL/proteasome dependence. NOTE (justified vs unjustified inference): this proves family-selective degradation is ACHIEVABLE; it does NOT prove the selectivity is CAUSED by ternary geometry (no solved ternary structure, no matched cross-paralogue cooperativity). So a workflow RECOVERING the NR4A1 preference is supportive-but-not-proof of the geometric hypothesis.
ground_truth.the_test: A workflow that cannot recover NR4A1>>NR4A2/NR4A3 for the KNOWN degrader must not be trusted to discover NR4A3 selectivity de-novo.

nrv04.architecture: celastrol (warhead, via its solvent-exposed C-28 carboxylic acid) -- amide -- 4-PEG linker -- amide -- VH032-class VHL ligand (two amide bonds; NR-V04 = the 4-PEG variant, most potent; Wang 2024).
nrv04.structure_caveat: REPRESENTATIVE, not a verified DB structure: warhead (celastrol, InChIKey KQJSQWZMSAGSHN) + linker length (4-PEG, two amides) + VHL-ligand class are from the paper's DESCRIBED composition; the exact VH032 connectivity/regiochemistry is my reconstruction. The ChEMBL record named 'NR-V04' (CHEMBL4779766) is a DIFFERENT (CRBN/glutarimide) compound and is NOT used (see published-warhead-registry.md). Linker length is a benchmark VARIABLE (scan) per the E3/linker-sensitivity readout.

vhl_ligand_vh032.note: hydroxyproline VHL recruiter; trans-OH required, epimer = inactive control

linker.note: NR-V04 = 4-PEG; also synthesize inactive-recruiter + free-warhead controls

e3.context: VHL functions in the VBC complex (ElonginB P62258 + ElonginC Q15369); include EloB/C context if the co-fold supports it, else VHL alone as a first pass

controls.vhl_positive: VHL (+EloB/C) + VH032 ALONE — does the workflow seat the hydroxyproline ligand in VHL's pocket? (the VHL analogue of the CRBN+lenalidomide control; if it fails, distrust every VHL ternary).
controls.inactive_recruiter: epimerized VH032 (cis-hydroxyproline) — should NOT recruit VHL; a negative control the workflow should score worse.

ensemble_readouts: accessible ternary-complex populations (iPTM / ligand-iPTM / confidence DISTRIBUTION across N seeds, not one pose)
linker strain (PEG conformational energy in the bound pose)
target-VHL interface: buried area + shape/chemical complementarity
PPI-interface stability / consistency across seeds + starting models (persistence)
predicted cooperativity / relative ternary stability (paralogue vs paralogue)
lysine presentation: solvent-exposed target Lys in a ubiquitination-compatible geometry relative to VHL/CRL4-E2~Ub (proxy only)
paralogue counterexamples (a seed/pose where NR4A2 or NR4A3 forms a BETTER geometry than NR4A1)

single_leg_first_pilot.rule: CLAUDE.md: pilot one leg for its RESULT before fanning out an abortable multi-leg spend.
single_leg_first_pilot.pilot: Run FIRST, cheaply: (1) the VHL+VH032 positive control, and (2) the NR4A1 ternary (the KNOWN-degraded case) across a few seeds.
single_leg_first_pilot.abort_if: the control cannot seat VH032 in VHL (workflow broken), OR the NR4A1 (known-degraded) ternary cannot form a productive, seed-persistent geometry — because then the workflow cannot even recover the positive case and the full NR4A1/2/3 x seeds x linkers fleet would be wasted spend.
single_leg_first_pilot.proceed_if: control validates AND NR4A1 forms a productive, reproducible ternary geometry -> THEN fan out to NR4A2 + NR4A3 (x seeds x linker variants) and compare paralogues.

verdict_gate.informative: reproducible signal consistent with NR4A1-favoured degradation geometry (NR4A1 > NR4A2/NR4A3 on the ensemble readouts) -> use the workflow comparatively for prospective NR4A3 architectures.
verdict_gate.inconclusive: plausible complexes but cannot distinguish paralogues -> use for geometry generation ONLY, not selectivity ranking.
verdict_gate.failed: favours the wrong paralogue or is initialization-dominated -> do NOT interpret predicted NR4A3 ternary selectivity (this limits the METHOD, not the NR-V04 experiment).

reuse: extends nr4a3_ternary.py / gpu-ternary-aws.yml / boltz_src (Boltz-2 --no_kernels, validated). Changes: E3 CRBN->VHL (+EloB/C); PROTAC = NR-V04 (above); N-seed ensembles; the readouts above; report_ternary.py interface mode extended for VHL + cross-paralogue ranking.

control_ligand.name: VH032
control_ligand.role: VHL positive-control ligand (the VHL analogue of the CRBN+lenalidomide control)
control_ligand.provenance: literature VH032 VHL ligand entered from its known structure; RDKit-validated (formula/MW match) and its (2S,4R)-4-hydroxyproline + 4-(4-methylthiazol-5-yl)phenyl VHL warhead matches the structure-verified NR-V04 representative SMILES (shared HasSubstructMatch). Used because VH032 does NOT resolve by pref_name in ChEMBL and PubChem name-lookup is unreliable from the job container, which silently skipped the control in the first two pilot runs.

control_vh032.note: VH032 seats in VHL hydroxyproline pocket (S111/H115/W117/Y98/H110) all seeds

productive_ternary_bridging.detail: NR4A1: NR-V04 contacts both NR4A1 (2.4-3.3 A) and VHL (2.3-2.6 A) every seed. NR4A2/NR4A3: warhead seats in VHL (2.0-2.6 A) but target LBD is 6-26 A away -> ligand bound to VHL only, no productive ternary in any seed.

exposed_lys_to_vhl_A_mean.note: ubiquitin-reach proxy orders correctly: degraded NR4A1 presents the closest exposed Lys to VHL

ligand_iptm_mean.note: INVERTS (spared NR4A2 highest) — ligand-iPTM scores the confidently-placed VHL-warhead half regardless of whether the ternary forms; NOT a valid ternary-selectivity metric on its own.

result.verdict_basis: productive-ternary geometry (bridging 3/3 vs 0/3) AND exposed-Lys->VHL reach both cleanly separate the experimentally-degraded NR4A1 from the spared NR4A2/NR4A3, recovering the known NR-V04 selectivity. ligand-iPTM alone does NOT (inverts). => the workflow can rank NR4A-family ternary selectivity when read on productive-geometry, not confidence, metrics.
caveats: retrospective n=1 (single positive control, NR-V04); encouraging but not a robust predictor
NR-V04 selectivity is FOR NR4A1; designing NR4A3 selectivity is a different problem (different paralogue, warhead, interface) — this makes an NR4A3 program credible, does not transfer directly
Boltz co-fold + --no_kernels; single linker (NR-V04's 4-PEG); no explicit E3-choice/linker-length scan yet; VHL modeled as VBC (VHL+EloB/C), CRL4/E2~Ub not modeled (Lys reach is a proxy)
